phases.name: Write ExperimentStatus and ResultRow tests
phases.reasoning: Write tests for ExperimentStatus roundtrip/trimming, ResultRow TSV roundtrip, and ResultRow parse error handling (too few fields, invalid score, invalid status). These are Steps 2-4 from the design doc. Create results.rs with stub types that compile but fail tests.

phases.name: Implement ExperimentStatus and ResultRow
phases.reasoning: Implement ExperimentStatus enum with as_str/from_str (with trim), ResultRow struct with to_tsv_line (4-decimal float formatting) and from_tsv_line (tab splitting, field count validation, parse error context). All 6 core type tests should pass.

phases.name: Write ResultsLog tests
phases.reasoning: Write tests for ResultsLog: open new file, append and save, load existing, count_by_status, best_score_for, last_n, history_summary (empty + with data), and reload persistence across sessions. These are Steps 5-12 from the design doc (8 test functions). Uses tempfile for isolated filesystem tests.

phases.name: Implement ResultsLog
phases.reasoning: Implement ResultsLog with open (conditional load), load (skip header, parse rows), save (write header + all rows), append (push + save for flush-on-write), and query methods: rows(), total_experiments(), count_by_status(), best_score_for() (keep-only filter), last_n() (saturating_sub slice), history_summary() (formatted string with recent experiments). All 14+ tests should pass.

phases.name: Wire module and refactor
phases.reasoning: Add pub mod results to src/cmd/autoresearch/mod.rs. Add doc comments to all public items. Run cargo clippy -- -D warnings and fix any lints. Run cargo build to verify full compilation. Run cargo test --lib cmd::autoresearch::results to verify all tests pass.
